title: Keep Random Items
description: Deletes random items when you die.
body:
# 🗑️ Keep Random Items

**Keep Random Items** datapack/mod deletes random items when you die.

## ✨ Features

**Keep Random Items removes items from 3 to 8 random inventory slots when you die.**

_The number 3–8 refers to inventory slots, not individual item counts—so all items in those selected slots are lost._

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Use `/reload` after joining the world.
4. You're all set! Move around and see your coordinates at the bottom of your screen.

## 🧱 Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.5+
- No external resource packs needed
